commit.message:
fix: corrige SVG sem dimensoes e return faltando no execFile callback

- DesignerService: rectSvg e circleSvg agora tem width/height explicitos
  no elemento <svg>. Sharp/librsvg no Linux exige dimensoes no elemento
  raiz para renderizar a mascara corretamente. Sem isso os cantos
  arredondados e a foto de perfil circular podiam nao renderizar.
- webhook-gemini.js: adicionado return antes do resolve() de erro no
  execFile callback — evita double-resolve e execucao desnecessaria
  apos erro.
- Versao atualizada para stable/auditoria-completa-v5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 2-minute cache to getAllPostsWithImages for faster calendar loading

Cache is invalidated on any create, update, or approval action so data
stays fresh. Significantly reduces Sheets API calls on repeated loads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve camera gimbal lock and mirror clone lean sync

Camera: Replace Euler rotation (pitch, yaw, roll) with quaternion
composition (Yaw * Pitch * Roll) in _syncCamera(). Euler angles with
non-zero roll cause axis coupling — rotating while leaning produced
wobble that progressively worsened until the camera locked downward.

Mirror clone: Switch from Spine1 bone rotation (overwritten each frame
by animation system) to character model root rotation, which persists
and correctly tilts the whole character in their local space.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security: fix 6 vulnerabilities in LLM proxy

commit.message:
Fix missing error_id in usage_metrics.jsonl for failed LLM attempts (#239)

The error_id was only extracted from exceptions that already had it
(LLMChatError), but many execute_function callbacks let raw exceptions
(e.g. pydantic ValidationError) propagate without wrapping in
LLMChatError. Now _try_one_attempt generates an error_id for every
failed attempt and includes it in both the log message and the usage
metric, enabling log-to-metric correlation regardless of exception type.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Track E: parseBlockHeader field characterization theorems (#1144)

* feat: parseBlockHeader field characterization theorems

Add three theorems in Zip/Spec/Zstd.lean connecting parsed
ZstdBlockHeader field values to raw bytes at the parse position:
- parseBlockHeader_lastBlock_eq (bit 0)
- parseBlockHeader_blockType_eq (bits 1-2)
- parseBlockHeader_blockSize_eq (bits 3-23)

These enable composing parseBlockHeader_succeeds with theorems
that require specific field values as hypotheses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: add field characterization pattern to parsing completeness skill

Document the proof pattern for extracting individual field values from
successful parse results, distinguishing between simple projections
(close with rfl) and conjunction goals over match branches (need
simp_all to use the match discriminant hypothesis).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add author footer to sender and receiver pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix auto-update: exit(0) doesn't trigger systemd Restart=on-failure

The auto-updater called process.exit(0) after pulling and compiling,
but systemd's Restart=on-failure only restarts on non-zero exit codes.
Changed to exit(1) so the service properly restarts after an update.

fix: timeout/maxBuffer no execFile e Content-Type dinamico nos scripts

1. execFile (publicar_no_instagram): adicionado timeout 5min e maxBuffer
   10MB — sem timeout o processo podia pendurar se Instagram API travasse;
   sem maxBuffer podia estourar o buffer padrao (1MB) com logs de 8+ uploads

2. postar-carrosel-instagram.mjs: Content-Type dinamico (image/jpeg para
   .jpg/.jpeg, image/png para .png) — estava sempre enviando image/png
   mesmo para arquivos JPEG, causando MIME errado no Supabase e potencial
   rejeicao pelo Instagram

fix(audio): improve jitter stats accuracy and diagnostics reliability

- Worklet: count underruns only on data→empty transitions with 300ms
  recency check, not every silent frame (was massively overreporting)
- Engine: exclude inter-transmission gap deltas from jitter stats, not
  just from charts (was inflating min/avg/max with legitimate pauses)
- Diagnostics: deduplicate completed transmission rows caused by race
  between stale card sweep and transmission_end event
- Diagnostics: snapshot real jitter stats in stale sweep path instead
  of defaulting to empty objects (was showing -- / -- / --)
- Diagnostics: make audio inclusion opt-in via checkbox to reduce
  report upload size

fix(security): reduce false positives in sanitizeOutput leak patterns

TOKEN= was too broad — AI explanations naturally write IDEMPOTENCY_TOKEN=xyz
and similar assignments. Narrow to DISCORD_TOKEN only.

Also tighten KEY/SECRET/PASSWORD/CREDENTIAL to require 20+ char values so
AI example code (KEY=placeholder, KEY=order_id) doesn't trigger a block.
Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as an explicit pattern.

commit.message:
Review: Zip/Spec/ZstdSequence.lean proof quality audit (#1145)

* refactor: ZstdSequence proof quality improvements

- Extract `resolveSequenceFseTables_destruct` to deduplicate the 3-call
  destructuring boilerplate shared by `resolveSequenceFseTables_pos_ge`
  and `resolveSequenceFseTables_valid`
- Simplify `hbeq` pattern in `parseSequencesHeader_numSeq_small` and
  `parseSequencesHeader_numSeq_medium` from verbose `intro heq; exact
  absurd (eq_of_beq heq) (by omega)` to `simp only [beq_iff_eq]; omega`
- Merge consecutive `rw` calls in both parseSequencesHeader proofs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: progress entry for ZstdSequence proof quality review

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add %dns, %geo, %title, %define, %wiki, %tr, %shorten, %stock, %isup, %paste, %tell, %whois commands

- %dns / %nslookup — A and AAAA record lookups via OS resolver
- %geo / %geoip / %ip — IP geolocation via ip-api.com (no key)
- %title / %t — fetch webpage <title>
- %define / %def — word definitions via Free Dictionary API
- %wiki / %w — Wikipedia summary
- %tr / %translate — translation via MyMemory API
- %shorten — URL shortener via TinyURL
- %stock — stock quotes via Yahoo Finance
- %isup / %up — check if a host/URL is reachable
- %paste — create encrypted PrivateBin paste at paste.interdo.me
- %tell / %remind — store a message for delivery when nick next speaks
- %whois — IRC WHOIS with formatted output
- Fix duck Sopel detection: strip IRC formatting before regex, broaden pattern to catch \^ variant
- Add Sanitizer.sanitize_hostname() for DNS/GeoIP input validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Connect Stripe payment links to Special and Royal tier buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(seo): add citability scoring and llms.txt generation to AEO module

Enhance the AEO audit with two new capabilities inspired by geo-seo-claude:

1. Passage-level citability scoring — 5-dimension weighted scoring (answer
   block quality, self-containment, structural readability, statistical
   density, uniqueness signals) with 134-167 word optimal range. Scores
   each content block 0-100 and reports top/bottom passages with fixes.

2. llms.txt audit and generation — validates existing llms.txt files against
   the emerging standard, scores 0-100, and generates ready-to-deploy
   llms.txt + llms-full.txt when absent by crawling sitemap and categorizing
   pages into sections.

Both integrated into existing /seo-aeo flow, no new commands.
Bumps skill version to 2.2.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- app/pet-detail.tsx: Pet profile header (name, breed, age, weight, allergies, conditions chips) + Health Timeline FlatList reading health_logs; SeverityBadge (color-coded 1-10), TypeLabel (triage/nutrition); empty state CTA; pull-to-refresh

Link all source literary texts to verified scholarly URLs

fix: address code review findings for Phase 1B refactor

- Fix notification service calling Prisma directly (move to repository)
- Use crypto.timingSafeEqual for webhook signature verification
- Fix session invalidation SQL to use JSON operators instead of LIKE
- Standardize audit events to auth.* prefix
- Add missing audit events (login_success, login_failed, logout, 2fa_*)

- Remove unused prisma mock from notification tests

fix: status_server.py cron detection matches own repo path

Previously matched the first autonomous-sync cron entry, which could
belong to a different agent on the same machine. Now filters by
PROJECT_ROOT to report only this agent's cron schedule.

commit.message:
Add recommendation feedback: Done/Skipped buttons on Insights page

- data/storage.py: get_rec_id_for_action_key() looks up existing rec_id
  by action_key + date
- analysis/next_actions.py: persist_next_actions() now returns
  action_rec_map (action_key → rec_id) including already-stored actions
- app/routers/analysis.py: next-actions endpoint always persists and
  attaches rec_id to each action in the response; new POST
  /recommendations/feedback endpoint records adopted/skipped
- frontend: ActionCard shows Done/Skipped buttons when rec_id present,
  transitions to confirmation tag after response; fades card when done

commit.message:
Fix stale dist: server restores from dist-web-backup at runtime

Railway build cache preserves old dist/ with localhost bundle.
Server now copies dist-web-backup/ over dist/ at startup, ensuring
the correct bundle is always served regardless of build cache state.

Add lightweight Dockerfile for background workers

are only needed by the web service. Use this for TokenKeeper and cron
job services on Render to cut build time and image size.
